statusDetail: Anton completed the scheduled site-improvement loop and recorded the result.
actionRequired: No action needed unless you want to review the latest commit.
summary:
Implemented the next safe Owner Workflow slice.

Changed:
- Garage restore preview now shows `Backup` and `Current` counts per valid section before import: [garage.js](/C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/garage.js:576).
- Fixed a real mobile deep-link rendering bug where `garage.html#diagnostic-activity` could scroll correctly but remain invisible because a parent `.section-reveal` stayed opacity 0: [shared-ui.js](/C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/shared-ui.js:1082).
- Extended the Garage restore Playwright audit to catch hidden reveal ancestors and verify the Backup/Current labels: [Invoke-GarageRestoreAudit.ps1](/C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/tools/audit/Invoke-GarageRestoreAudit.ps1:110).
- Bumped the service worker cache to `ridgeline-console-v271`: [service-worker.js](/C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/service-worker.js:1).
- Updated `AGENT_STATE.md`, `AGENT_BACKLOG.md`, `ANTON_ROADMAP.md`, `SITE_QUALITY_AUDIT.md`, and `ANTON.md`.

Verified:
- `Invoke-GarageRestoreAudit.ps1 -Tag audit-v273` passed.
- `Test-InternalLinks.ps1` passed for 16 HTML files.
- New screenshots: `debug-screenshots/audit-v273-garage-restore-audit-mobile.png` and `debug-screenshots/audit-v273-garage-restore-audit-desktop.png`.

Next clean slice: fold `Invoke-GarageRestoreAudit.ps1` into `Invoke-SiteAudit.ps1`, likely behind a switch or Garage-specific audit option so the deeper file-import coverage is easy to run without making every lightweight audit too slow.
